description: Generate a .res, .gct, .snp, .cn, .loh, or .odf file containing only specified features (i.e. rows).
author: Joshua Gould, Broad Institute
plan:
## SelectFeaturesRows GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
SelectFeaturesRows is a GenePattern module that Generate a .res, .gct, .snp, .cn, .loh, or .odf file containing only specified features (i.e. rows).

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 3 parameters:
- Required: input.filename, list.filename, output
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>SelectFeaturesRows.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-modules.jar org.genepattern.modules.selectfeaturesrows.SelectFeaturesRows <input.filename> <list.filename> <output>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input.filename
parameters.description: input file - .res, .gct, .snp, .cn, .loh, or .odf file from which the slice is extracted

parameters.name: list.filename
parameters.description: text file containing one identifier per line that specifies the rows to select.
